Funds Status: Unrecoverable

Description: IT security detects mass outbound email anomaly via SIEM alert and takes emergency action to contain the threat.

Detection Source: Microsoft Defender for O365 - Bulk outbound email anomaly alert
Alert Threshold Exceeded: 847 outbound emails in 34 minutes from single account
Actions Taken:
1. smitchell@pinnaclerealty.com disabled and all sessions revoked at 03:05 AM
2. Email security vendor contacted to quarantine SVG emails in recipient inboxes
3. 312 of 847 emails quarantined before delivery - 535 delivered
4. Forensic image of mailbox taken for FBI evidence preservation
5. All party notifications initiated at business open 08:00 AM
